user_prompt: X3 mobile game activity background art, 2D semi-painted illustration, vibrant fantasy colors, soft cinematic lighting, clean focal composition, high detail. BRIGHT sunlit shallow-sea diving theme (NOT a dark abyss, NOT lovecraftian, NOT gloomy). Palette: ocean blue, light cyan, teal-green, treasure gold, pearl white, warm sunlight orange. Motifs: light caustics / god-rays through water, rising bubbles, fish schools, coral, pearls, seashells. Use reference image 1 ONLY for the spatial composition / framing / where focal subjects sit (ERASE its summer colors, theme and any UI). Use reference image 2 for the deep-sea palette and motif. Scene: a navigator's sea-chart desk in a warm-lit ship cabin — an unrolled nautical chart scroll, a brass compass, a telescope and a ship's wheel; a graceful heroine present in the upper area as in the layout reference. Output ONLY the painted background scene. NO UI buttons, NO text, NO numbers, NO reward panels, NO progress bars, NO frames, NO watermark.
